voiceEndpoints.notes: Best near-term room voice reach while JARVIS remains the orchestration layer.

displayEndpoints.role: shared display and family-mode output surface
displayEndpoints.notes: Strong target for family dashboard, Chronicle, and evening review surfaces.

environment.role: lighting scenes, room controls, and plug automation
environment.notes: Strong target for Dawn Protocol, Dinner Mode, and practical room-level automations.

environment.role: porch, garage, and room-adjacent video feeds for perception and security context
environment.notes: Strong early perception target for package detection, garage context, and privacy-governed camera events.

environment.role: network foundation and possible device-presence signal
environment.notes: Useful for network-aware presence and segmented rollout planning.

accessAndArrival.role: garage state, departure choreography, and arrival context
accessAndArrival.notes: One of the most valuable early real-world integrations.

safetySystems.role: smoke, carbon monoxide, and voice-location alerts
safetySystems.notes: Major E12 asset for moving from simulated hazard flows to real alerts.

identityAndPresence.role: identity, presence, approval second factor, and personal notifications
identityAndPresence.notes: Best near-term source for arrival detection and explicit approvals.

identityAndPresence.role: subtle alerts, approvals, and personal nudges
identityAndPresence.notes: Useful for quiet notifications and second-factor confirmations.
